title: Oru Mani Adithal Lyrics Kaalamellam Kadhal Vaazhga
stanzas:
<div>
Oru Mani Adithal Lyrics Kaalamellam Kadhal Vaazhga

oru mani adiththaal
penne un niyaabagam.
telephone kuyile vendum
un dharisanam

podhum kanne
nee nadathum naadagamae.
thoongum podhum
thoongavillai un niyaabagamae

paadinaal andha paadalin
swaram nee adiyo.
thaedinaal vizhi eeramaavadhu
yaenadiyo..

oru mani adiththaal
penne un niyaabagam.
telephone kuyile vendum
un dharisanam

vaasam mattum veesum poove
vannam konjam kaattuvaayaa
thendral pole engum unnai
thaedugiren naan thaedugiren

thaedi unnai paarthu paarthu
kangal rendum verthu verthu
sindhum vizhi neeril naane
moozhgugiren naan moozhgugiren

veesidum puyal kaatrile
naan ottrai siragaanen.
kadhalin sudum theeyile
naan eriyum viragaanen.

maedai thorum paadal
thandha vaanmadhiye.
jeevan pogum munbu
vandhaal nimmadhiye.

podhum kanne
nee nadathum naadagamae.
thoongum podhum
thoongavillai un niyaabagamae

oru mani adiththaal
penne un niyaabagam.
telephone kuyile vendum
un dharisanam

undhan mugam paartha pinne
kannirandu povathendraal
kannirandum naan izhappen
ippodhe naan ippodhe.

undha mugam paarkkum munne
naan marindhu povathendraal
kangal mattum appozhudhum
moodaathe imai moodaadhe.

kadhale en kadhale
ennai kaanikkai thandhuvitten.
sodhanai ini thaevaiyaa
sudum moochinil vendhu vitten.

kadhal ennum saabam
thandha dhevathaiye.
kaanalaamo raagam indru
povathaiye.

podhum kanne
nee nadathum naadagamae.
thoongum podhum
thoongavillai un niyaabagamae

oru mani adiththaal
penne un niyaabagam.
telephone kuyile vendum
un dharisanam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between lovers.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Kaalamellam Kadhal Vaazhga.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Mani Adithal, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The song captures the essence of longing and connection, resonating with listeners who cherish their memories of love. Set against the backdrop of Kaalamellam Kadhal Vaazhga, it evokes a sense of warmth and tenderness. Hariharan's soulful rendition, combined with Deva's melodic composition, makes this song a classic that continues to be loved by many.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Mani Adithal from Kaalamellam Kadhal Vaazhga is a timeless romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Hariharan's soulful voice and Deva's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love. Dive into the nostalgic vibes of this classic that continues to touch hearts even today.
stanzaMeanings: With just one touch of the bell, I remember you, girl. I need your sight like a telephone call.
When you walk, the world moves with you. When you sleep, I can't sleep because of my memories of you.
When you sing, your voice is my delight. Why do your eyes seem to cry when I search for you?
Just the fragrance of flowers can show a little color. Like the breeze, I search for you everywhere.
Looking at you, my eyes wander and get lost in tears. I drown in my own tears.
In the blowing wind, I become a single note. In the fire of love, I burn like a flame.
Every stage gives a song to the sky. Before life passes, you bring peace.
When you walk, the world moves with you. When you sleep, I can't sleep because of my memories of you.
When I see your face, tears flow from my eyes. I cry now, I cry now.
When I see your face, I forget everything. My eyes should never close at that moment.
Oh love, my love, you have given me a vision. I have left behind the need for trials.
Love is a curse that has given me a deity. Is it a melody that will fade away today?
When you walk, the world moves with you. When you sleep, I can't sleep because of my memories of you.
